name: Block package performance and allocation reduction

description: Baseline - current block production performance with 100 txs

asi.hotspots: sha256.New() in leafHashOpt (~213B), txsToByteSlices allocs [][]byte, Data.ToProto allocs, DACommitment creates pruned Data, ApplyBlock converts Txs to [][]byte

description: sync.Pool for sha256.Hash in leafHashOpt — eliminates 2 sha256.New() allocations per block

asi.hypothesis: pool sha256.Hash to avoid 213B allocation per sha256.New()
asi.next_target: Data.ToProto allocates [][]byte via txsToByteSlices — should be biggest remaining win

description: Unsafe reinterpret cast of Txs to [][]byte in ApplyBlock — eliminates make([][]byte, n) allocation

asi.hypothesis: use unsafe.Slice/unsafe.SliceData instead of make+loop for Txs→[][]byte conversion
asi.note: types.Tx = []byte so types.Txs = []Tx has identical memory layout to [][]byte
